overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit dystopian urban environment at night. The character moves from a covered underpass through an intersection with large digital billboards, then into a covered commercial walkway with shops and seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with red tiled walls

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a red jacket through the covered underpass walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking steadily ahead of the player character

entered.detail: tall wall covered in red tiles with graffiti markings running along the left side of the walkway
dark concrete ceiling of the overpass structure overhead with visible pipes and beams
thick yellow painted line running down the center of the pedestrian walkway
large red cylindrical support pillars for the overpass structure
illuminated digital signs mounted on the overpass ceiling displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered underpass with distinctive red tiled walls on the left and a yellow line marking the pedestrian path. The space is artificially lit with overhead lights, and the camera follows a pedestrian in a red jacket moving ahead through the enclosed walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large digital billboard and crosswalk

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open urban intersection with visible sky
crosses the street at the intersection while vehicles pass by on the right

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing the intersection while following the pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying a samurai skull image with neon lighting
zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt road surface
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and vehicle traffic
tall modern building with glass facade visible on the left side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a wide open intersection dominated by a massive digital billboard displaying a samurai skull. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as the sky becomes visible, and the character crosses the asphalt road while a car passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with neon signage and circular light installation

events.description: turns left at the intersection to follow the path along the plaza
passes a large warm circular light structure casting yellow illumination on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking along the plaza area with neon billboards and reflective wet ground

entered.detail: massive circular yellow light fixture mounted on a building facade illuminating the plaza
tall modern building with illuminated windows and architectural lighting
tall vertical digital advertising screen on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character turns left into a plaza area featuring a distinctive large circular yellow light structure on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding digital billboards as the character approaches a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with shops benches and digital displays

events.description: enters the covered walkway with the Fourth Wall shop sign visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial walkway passing benches and illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on an orange bench on the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered pedestrian walkway with integrated lighting
illuminated blue neon sign reading FOURTH WALL mounted on the building facade
modern orange benches lined along the right side of the walkway
large rectangular planters containing tall spiky illuminated plants
multiple digital advertising screens displaying colorful neon advertisements on the left wall
tall building with glass windows and green interior lighting on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered commercial walkway marked by a blue neon FOURTH WALL sign. The space features orange benches, illuminated planters with spiky plants, and digital advertising screens along the walls. The environment is artificially lit and sheltered from the open sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban underpass into a wide neon-lit intersection and finally into a sheltered commercial plaza. It begins within a narrow walkway defined by red tiled walls and overhead artificial lighting, following a pedestrian in a red jacket along a yellow path. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the space opens into a vast intersection dominated by a massive digital billboard of a samurai skull, where the lighting shifts to a mix of open sky and city glow as a car passes by. The scene then transitions across the wet asphalt toward a plaza featuring a large circular yellow light structure, with the ground reflecting the surrounding neon brilliance. Finally, the camera follows the character into a covered walkway marked by a blue Fourth Wall sign, moving past orange benches and illuminated planters into a sheltered environment of digital advertising screens.
